---
title: "Cox regression"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
---

## Cox regression for gender

```{r}
#| label: 08-04-whas-gender-cox-model

whas_gender_cox_model
```

## Kaplan-Meier plot for age groups

```{r}
#| label: 08-04-whas_age_km_plot

whas_age_km_plot
```

## Cox model for age

```{r}
#| label: 08-04-whas-age-cox-model

whas_age_cox_model
```

## Covariate imbalance, 1

```{r}
#| label: 08-04-whas-imbalance-mean-table

whas_imbalance_mean_table
```

## Covariate imbalance, 2

```{r}
#| label: 08-04-whas-imbalance-box-plot
#| fig.width: 6
#| fig.height: 1.5

whas_imbalance_box_plot
```

## Cox regression adjusted for age

```{r}
#| label: 08-04-whas-adjusted-cox-model

whas_adjusted_cox_model
```
